headline: Nvidia Stock, Biotech Put This Line In Focus Amid U.S.-Iran Attacks
summary: As U.S.-Iran tensions escalated into attacks over the weekend, Nvidia, ASML and other leaders showed resilience Monday.

headline: PMI Rises in February, Marking Second Month of U.S. Manufacturing Growth
summary: FEATURE  The U.S. manufacturing economy gave investors some good news on Monday: a second consecutive month of growth. The Institute for Supply Management’s Purchasing Managers Index, or PMI came in at 52.

headline: Shares of space-related stocks are trading higher, possibly amid sympathy with defense companies after the U.S.-Israel strikes on Iran. The industry may be seeing strength as investors anticipate SpaceX's confidential IPO filing, which is expected sometime in March.
summary: Shares of space-related stocks are trading higher, possibly amid sympathy with defense companies after the U.S.-Israel strikes on Iran. The industry may be seeing strength as investors anticipate SpaceX's confidential IPO filing, which is expected sometime in March.

headline: Should You Invest in GE (GE) Based on Bullish Wall Street Views?
summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in GE (GE). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?

raw.headline: Should You Invest in GE (GE) Based on Bullish Wall Street Views?
raw.summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in GE (GE). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?

headline: Khamenei's death raises questions about Trump's China trip
summary: U.S. President Donald Trump has been scheduled to visit China at the end of March, following tense trade relations with Beijing.
